headline: Visa's Ingenico Tie-Up: Expanding Beyond the Payment Layer
summary: V deepens its commerce push with Ingenico, integrating POS and payments to unify online-offline experiences and expand beyond transaction processing.

headline: Mastercard just super-charged Wall Street’s crypto land grab with $1.8bn BVNK acquisition
summary: Mastercard this week announced it was buying stablecoin infrastructure firm BVNK for $1.8 billion. The deal accelerates the payment giant’s move into the crypto space. Traditional financial firms are rushing to get involved with stablecoins.

raw.headline: Mastercard just super-charged Wall Street’s crypto land grab with $1.8bn BVNK acquisition

headline: REPLY Unveils the New Editions of the Reply AI Music Contest and Reply AI Film Festival under the Theme "Imaginatio Nova"
summary: TURIN, Italy, March 19, 2026--Reply [EXM, STAR: REY, ISIN: IT0005282865] confirms its commitment for 2026 to fostering dialogue between creativity, technology and artificial intelligence through the Reply AI Music Contest and the Reply AI Film Festival, the two international AI competitions open to creatives, filmmakers, musicians and innovation professionals from around the world.
